steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts elements isolated quickly (like phosphorus) with those where "this wasn't the case" — meaning isolation wasn't quick. The blank introduces what typically happened in that second group.

steps.title: Show the typical pattern
steps.content:
The logical relationship is specification within a contrast. The blank needs a transition signaling how long isolation typically took for the slower-to-isolate elements.
  • Choice A — "even so,": signals that something is true despite what came before, implying the slow isolation is surprising given the contrast — but the contrast already established this group as slow, so "even so" creates a logical loop. ✗
  • Choice B — "similarly,": signals that the second group behaved like the first (quick isolation), which contradicts the "this wasn't the case" signal in the sentence before the blank. ✗
  • Choice C — "furthermore,": signals an additional supporting point, but the slow-isolation detail isn't adding to the quick-isolation claim — it's describing the contrasting group. ✗
  • Choice D — "often,": signals a frequent pattern within that group, so fits — for elements where isolation wasn't quick, it often took a few years. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
